Project Zomboid Scripts API Reference
  • Script Blocks Reference
  • item
  • View page source

item

Defines an item to register.

Hierarchy

Valid Parent Blocks:

  • module

This block can be soft overridden in scripts.

Parameters

AcceptItemFunction

Type: Any

No description

Item types: container

AcceptMediaType

Type: int

No description

Default: -1

Item types: radio

ActivatedItem

Type: Any

No description

Item types: clothing, drainable, weaponpart

Type: Any

No description

Item types: weapon

Type: Any

CustomEatSound

Type: Any

Custom sound to play when eating or drinking this item, refers to the ID of a sound script. Set to an empty string to disable any sound from playing.

Can be empty: ✓

Item types: drainable, food, normal

ItemType

Type: string (required)

No description

Type

Type: Any

This parameter was replaced by ItemType in Build 42.13.

DisplayName

Type: Any

This parameter was removed in Build 42.13, naming an item should be done with a translation entry. See the [wiki](https://pzwiki.net/wiki/DisplayName) page for more information.

MinSightRange

Type: Any

Item types: weapon, weaponpart

MinutesToBurn

Type: float

How many in-game minutes it takes to burn the food. This value must be higher than MinutesToCook.

Default: 120

Item types: food

MinutesToCook

Type: float

How many in-game minutes it takes to cook the food. This value must be smaller than MinutesToBurn.

Default: 60

Item types: food

No description
